author: sdking
description: Render draw.io diagrams inline in your notes with zoom, pan, and multi-page support. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: sdking.xing
manifest.description: Render draw.io diagrams inline in your notes with zoom, pan, and multi-page support.
manifest.name: Draw.io View

name: Draw.io View

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🚀 Features
- feat: stencil library support, shape detection banner, perf overhaul (v0.0.8)
- feat: parallel stencil detection, download banner, remove libs from code block
- feat: auto-manage stencil libs, libs on separate line, fix electrical 404
- feat: add CSS for stencil warning button, sync panel, and settings list
- feat: load stencils before render, detect issues, add ⚠ HUD sync panel
- feat: add customStencilDir setting and Shape Libraries section
- feat: add StencilManager with OFFICIAL_LIBS, registerXml, detect, load, download
- feat: extend ViewOptions with libs[] field, parse libs: token

## 🐛 Bug fixes
- fix: remove crispEdges from path (caused jagged curves on rounded shapes)
- fix: use display-offset (screen pixels) to restore view after soft-reload
- fix: preserve view on soft-reload, no re-render on libs update, parallel dir loading
- fix: stencil shape lookup (prefix+normalize), fix session cache for edit/preview switch
- fix: session cache for loaded libs (no repeated I/O), fix catalog, support dir-based stencils (electrical, cisco, etc.)
- fix: use URL-encoded SVG data URI to avoid semicolon splitting in maxgraph style parser
- fix: support SVG image-based shape libs (IBM etc.) via lazy download + data URI

## ⚡ Performance
- perf: detach all @maxgraph redraws + per-subfile stencil load; fix: reserve code-block height to stop scroll jump; feat: rounded curlyBracket
- perf: single detached redraw on soft-reload; feat: bolder libs banner + Settings shortcut
- perf: local-first stencil load (single render pass), defer only network downloads to banner

**Full changelog**: https://github.com/SdKay/obsidian-drawio-view/compare/0.0.7...0.0.8
